property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-26\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;c:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-26\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\maven\bin;c:\Users\Juanita\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5\bundled\scripts\noConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Complete happy path - Search, Book, and Receive Confirmation", "Optional[End-to-End Booking System Flow - Shady Meadows B&B]"](1)
testcase.system-out:
@E2E @HotelBookingAPI @e2e @smoke @regression @positive @E2E_1 @api Scenario Outline: Complete happy path - Search, Book, and Receive Confirmation # src/test/resources/features/e2eHotelBooking.feature:55 14:27:47.955 [TestNG-tests-1] ERROR com.booking.utilities.ConfigReader - Error loading properties file: src\test\resources\config\application.properties (The system cannot find the file specified) java.io.FileNotFoundException: src\test\resources\config\application.properties (The system cannot find the file specified) at java.io.FileInputStream.open0(Native Method) ~[?:?] at java.io.FileInputStream.open(FileInputStream.java:185) ~[?:?] at java.io.FileInputStream.<init>(FileInputStream.java:139) { "bookingid": 8, "roomid": 2389, "firstname": "John", "lastname": "Doe", "depositpaid": false, "bookingdates": { "checkin": "2025-12-15", "checkout": "2025-12-18" } } And User creates a new booking with following details and submits the booking: # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_creates_a_new_booking_with_following_details_and_submits_the_booking(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) Then API response status code should be 201 for booking creation # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.API_response_status_code_should_be_for_booking_creation(int) And User should see booking confirmation page with booking ID displayed # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_should_see_booking_confirmation_page_with_booking_ID_displayed() {firstname=Josh, depositpaid=false, bookingid=8, roomid=6, lastname=Mick} Spec: io.restassured.internal.RequestSpecificationImpl@7f0044f1 Request method: PUT Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/booking/8 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Cookie=token=BAosptuFk9DyC4Pk Authorization=automationintesting.online Content-Type=application/json; testcase.name: runScenario["Complete happy path - Search, Book, and Receive Confirmation", "Optional[End-to-End Booking System Flow - Shady Meadows B&B]"](2)
testcase.system-out:
@E2E @HotelBookingAPI @e2e @smoke @regression @positive @E2E_1 @api Scenario Outline: Complete happy path - Search, Book, and Receive Confirmation # src/test/resources/features/e2eHotelBooking.feature:56 Request method: POST Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/auth/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "password", "username": "admin" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sun, 29 Mar 2026 08:57:54 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: zoFbrORvRdOtFyoroB_USg x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsat1880032-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsat1880032-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=jeHv4pDyHrqH4ZOMzpb9YDItnD3K2ONQJFem5g4%2Bpbo2BfU2HFTFO4%2BypoF4wXs9iPMsL3TV9HAZdI2kaXQYl4EqRkbohCsOGt0BUoZN0ZcM%2BkOjCqVuzY1g8ZnHbxnre%2FCR%2FpZLs3P9yrCwRg%3D%3D"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e3dab743feaaa1c-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "token": "vjuLmjXJWet7l9LX" } When User authenticates as admin credentials: # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_authenticates_as_admin_credentials(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) And User stores the authentication token # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_stores_the_authentication_token() Then API response status code for E2E should be 200 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.API_response_status_code_for_E_E_should_be(int) When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-12-20" and checkout "2025-12-25" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_enters_search_criteria_with_checkin_and_checkout(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) POST request to endpoint: /booking Request body: {firstname=Jane, bookingdates={checkin=2025-12-20, checkout=2025-12-25}, phone=07358480686, depositpaid=false, roomid=2155, email=jane@example.com, lastname=Smith} Header: Cookie: token=vjuLmjXJWet7l9LX Request method: POST Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/booking Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Authorization=Bearer vjuLmjXJWet7l9LX Cookie=token=vjuLmjXJWet7l9LX Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstname": "Jane", "bookingdates": { "checkin": "2025-12-20", "checkout": "2025-12-25" }, "phone": "07358480686", "depositpaid": false, "roomid": 2155, "email": "jane@example.com", "lastname": "Smith" } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Sun, 29 Mar 2026 08:57:55 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: pzxaUWklRFG3RtdFmrpb1w x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsat1880028-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsat1880028-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=5Mle%2FeSD42mE3ySOWGAIzGqfOd1Tt7gZHiLKlC06eb%2F%2B1aqrBnpkt0x6oEuG3Ykw3aC8xVr%2BVz%2Bq%2FCpg2L7JzrqZ6GdpT9XeO2ckHwz5Wsfwc0FUVdAeWeVJ35QboBge8NO4CxexwGK9UABaSg%3D%3D"}]} CF-RAY: 9e3dab775f09c3c2-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "bookingid": 9, "roomid": 2155, "firstname": "Jane", "lastname": "Smith", "depositpaid": false, "bookingdates": { "checkin": "2025-12-20", "checkout": "2025-12-25" } } And User creates a new booking with following details and submits the booking: # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_creates_a_new_booking_with_following_details_and_submits_the_booking(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) Then API response status code should be 201 for booking creation # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.API_response_status_code_should_be_for_booking_creation(int) And User should see booking confirmation page with booking ID displayed # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_should_see_booking_confirmation_page_with_booking_ID_displayed() {firstname=Josh, depositpaid=false, bookingid=9, roomid=6, lastname=Mick} Spec: io.restassured.internal.RequestSpecificationImpl@104b6a31 Request method: PUT Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/booking/9 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Cookie=token=vjuLmjXJWet7l9LX Authorization=automationintesting.online Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstname": "Josh", "bookingdates": { "checkin": "2026-03-11", "checkout": "2026-03-12" }, "depositpaid": false, "bookingid": 9, "roomid": 6, "lastname": "Mick" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sun, 29 Mar 2026 08:57:55 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: CwJwQ6djQ-iI99YyoB_USg x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsat1880076-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsat1880076-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=69nkHtuvKLHLCIrIkoGhDLT%2BaujQPSCJZGkjQdLcIypgsarJHkpFGZdVgPS23RYcBgv0e3ZvImqaIiDSUi9Vw2F%2BGdEknpIsWg%2FyoAyLhqwumWpkQablxPkSz3B0vTzpSM6BjqNT2QOa1g5NfQ%3D%3D"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e3dab797db13de1-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "success": true } When User attempts to update booking ID with following details: # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_attempts_to_update_booking_ID_with_following_details(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) Then Booking update should be successful with status 200 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.Booking_update_should_be_successful_with_status(int) {"success":true} And Updated booking details should be reflected in system # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.Updated_booking_details_should_be_reflected_in_system() Request method: GET Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/booking/9 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Authorization=Bearer vjuLmjXJWet7l9LX Cookie=token=vjuLmjXJWet7l9LX Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sun, 29 Mar 2026 08:57:56 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: enLuuWuIQ3q_W3aA-8Y8hA x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsap440031-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsap440031-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=%2BCtWdVrg94sFaQ32iLlu4zlR9N%2Fa%2F1PLQtBbENIndP08FpoyhLAKQKGijcU7nPpNbk6QHRbwb6MITH%2FKDHaZynFEGrlLR0EkVlCd3RYYU5PcxGX1WdhVggGN5dHr%2FZues%2BOKOEykpaiPFt%2Fj%2BA%3D%3D"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e3dab7b9ec6cdd1-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400

{ "success": true } When User attempts to cancel booking with ID via API # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_attempts_to_cancel_booking_with_ID_via_API() Then Booking cancellation should be successful with status 200 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.Booking_cancellation_should_be_successful_with_status(int) Request method: GET Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/booking/9 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Authorization=Bearer vjuLmjXJWet7l9LX Cookie=token=vjuLmjXJWet7l9LX Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found Date: Sun, 29 Mar 2026 08:57:57 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: 2l6N_YzLRqyOl-OuipRofQ x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsat1880072-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsat1880072-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=tErGqq208rPeOMf4EqaKOg9rRJTIaEivHjtnxMFXlkU0Herb2WVenqTpAOQ%2FtfbmP6ElHAop41EHxn8ky9vE4xWcJlCPkKDwfcV3Yq652NLtN38E%2FkLWeEUTcLhlQWFX0fHsOyrWUlyOkdaRvA%3D%3D"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e3dab825c3a40d4-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "error": "Failed to fetch booking: 404" } And API response should return 404 when retrieving cancelled booking details # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.API_response_should_return_when_retrieving_cancelled_booking_details(int)

testcase.name: runScenario["Complete happy path - Search, Book, and Receive Confirmation", "Optional[End-to-End Booking System Flow - Shady Meadows B&B]"](3)
testcase.system-out:
@E2E @HotelBookingAPI @e2e @smoke @regression @positive @E2E_1 @api Scenario Outline: Complete happy path - Search, Book, and Receive Confirmation # src/test/resources/features/e2eHotelBooking.feature:57 Request method: POST Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/auth/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "password", "username": "admin" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sun, 29 Mar 2026 08:57:57 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: AHfDoTecTg-Wjp-4acI7Nw x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsat1880032-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsat1880032-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=mLwROw9b2pSJXfJD4ea7yG5hz7J69NIiz8DhfDSRNDlqH7tYproX9P6dFs%2BkncY5i4mb9Oww49KCSLBF6mJ%2BuxvpgHw%2FbwyPkxQLa60S8rulQ2QrZmnIJWVLLqBGHJUo2FZXID99YSawISFbTA%3D%3D"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e3dab85eccb4b6d-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "token": "NQxnewf1iRFKRilh" } When User authenticates as admin credentials: # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_authenticates_as_admin_credentials(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) And User stores the authentication token # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_stores_the_authentication_token() Then API response status code for E2E should be 200 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.API_response_status_code_for_E_E_should_be(int) When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-12-10" and checkout "2025-12-12" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_enters_search_criteria_with_checkin_and_checkout(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) POST request to endpoint: /booking Request body: {firstname=Bob, bookingdates={checkin=2025-12-10, checkout=2025-12-12}, phone=07358480687, depositpaid=false, roomid=2639, email=bob@example.com, lastname=Johnson} Header: Cookie: token=NQxnewf1iRFKRilh Request method: POST Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/booking Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Authorization=Bearer NQxnewf1iRFKRilh Cookie=token=NQxnewf1iRFKRilh Content-Type=application/json; { "bookingid": 10, "roomid": 2639, "firstname": "Bob", "lastname": "Johnson", "depositpaid": false, "bookingdates": { "checkin": "2025-12-10", "checkout": "2025-12-12" } } And User creates a new booking with following details and submits the booking: # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_creates_a_new_booking_with_following_details_and_submits_the_booking(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) Then API response status code should be 201 for booking creation # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.API_response_status_code_should_be_for_booking_creation(int) And User should see booking confirmation page with booking ID displayed # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_should_see_booking_confirmation_page_with_booking_ID_displayed() {firstname=Josh, depositpaid=false, bookingid=10, roomid=6, lastname=Mick} Spec: io.restassured.internal.RequestSpecificationImpl@4618e03d Request method: PUT Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/booking/10 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Cookie=token=NQxnewf1iRFKRilh Authorization=automationintesting.online Content-Type=application/json;
